title: Crash when the schema for sqlite_sequence is corrupt
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE fake_sequence(name TEXT PRIMARY KEY, seq INTEGER);
UPDATE test_table SET value = 0.0 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Corrupted sqlite_sequence entry causes autoincrement table crash
